name: 陆姝仪

appearance.distinguishing_features: 泪眼盈盈如清泉般的眸子

visual_reference: delicate beautiful Chinese maiden in soft pink Hanfu, gentle willow eyes with pitiful teary expression, soft delicate features, frail slender body, long flowing black hair, vulnerable posture, highly detailed 8k
visual_prompt_negative: strong build, aggressive pose, modern fashion, sharp eyes
personality: 柔弱倔强、善于示弱、心机深沉
desire: 获得沈词庇护，嫁得好人家
flaw: 心机重、陷害他人、嫉妒心强
arc: 从陷害到坦白承认（也重生），最终退出
scene_presence: 女主主要情敌，多次制造冲突与陷害

relationships.dynamic: 单方面依恋，被女主视为威胁
